description.en: SVMs made statistical learning theory tangible: choose a boundary that separates classes with the largest margin, then use kernels to make linear separation possible in transformed feature spaces. The method became a dominant machine-learning tool before deep learning’s resurgence. It connected elegant theory, convex optimization, and practical classifiers.
description.zh: 支持向量机让统计学习理论变得可操作：选择能以最大间隔分开类别的边界，再用核函数在变换后的特征空间中实现线性分离。它在深度学习复兴之前长期是主流机器学习工具。SVM 将优雅理论、凸优化和实用分类器连接在一起。

html.en: In the early 1990s, machine learning needed methods that could generalize from limited data with clear mathematical guarantees. SVMs translated VC-style capacity control into a practical classifier.
html.zh: 20 世纪 90 年代初，机器学习需要能在有限数据上泛化并具有清晰数学保证的方法。SVM 将 VC 式容量控制转化为实用分类器。

html.en: SVMs prefer a boundary that is not merely correct on training data, but comfortably separated from the closest examples. Kernels make nonlinear boundaries possible while preserving a convex optimization problem.
html.zh: SVM 偏好不只是训练集正确、而且离最近样本足够远的边界。核函数让非线性边界成为可能，同时保留凸优化问题。

html.en: Experts generally treat SVMs as mature classical methods whose conceptual importance exceeds their role in most modern deep-learning pipelines. Their long-term legacy is the margin-and-kernel view of generalization, robust boundaries, and nonlinear classification.
html.zh: 专家通常把 SVM 视为成熟的经典方法，其概念重要性超过了它在多数现代深度学习流水线中的实际角色。它的长期影响在于用间隔和核方法理解泛化、稳健边界和非线性分类。

method.zh: 带核函数的最大间隔分类

material.en: COLT paper and statistical learning theory
material.zh: COLT 论文与统计学习理论

text.en: The classifier chooses the separating boundary with the widest gap to the nearest training examples.
text.zh: 分类器选择与最近训练样本之间间隔最宽的分隔边界。

text.en: Only the closest examples define the boundary, making the model depend on critical cases rather than all points equally.
text.zh: 只有最接近边界的样本定义分类面，使模型依赖关键样本，而不是同等依赖所有点。

text.en: Kernels compute similarity as if data had been mapped into a richer space, without explicitly constructing that space.
text.zh: 核函数像是在更丰富空间中计算相似度，却不需要显式构造那个空间。

description.en: Original ACM record for the 1992 optimal-margin classifier paper.
description.zh: ACM 原始记录：1992 年最优间隔分类器论文。

license.en: Reference link only; local images are redrawn and do not copy publisher figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地图片为重绘，不复制出版方图形。

label.en: A Training Algorithm for Optimal Margin Classifiers
label.zh: 最优间隔分类器的训练算法
